$schema.description: JSON schema reference. Editors use this to enable validation; ccgate ignores it at runtime.

command.description: Shell command. Stdout is the credential. Run via the configured shell (default bash).

shell.description: Shell that runs `command`. "bash" runs `bash -c <command>`. "powershell" runs `pwsh -Command <command>` when pwsh is on PATH (PowerShell 7+, cross-platform) and falls back to `powershell -Command <command>` (Windows PowerShell 5.1) otherwise. Default: bash.

refresh_margin_ms.description: Cache early-refresh threshold + minimum remaining TTL guard for fresh credentials, in milliseconds. Default: 60000.

timeout_ms.description: Hard cap on one Resolve call (lock + helper exec), in milliseconds. Default: 30000.

cache_key.description: Secret-free salt added to the cache fingerprint so a single command string can produce per-account cache entries (used as-is; pull env values via jsonnet std.native('env') / std.native('must_env')).

path.description: Path to the credential file. Absolute, ~/-prefixed, or relative (relative paths resolve from the hook's working directory at fire time, not the config file's directory). Omit the field to use the default $XDG_STATE_HOME/ccgate/<target>/auth_key.json; do not set it to an empty string.

refresh_margin_ms.description: Minimum remaining TTL guard for file output, in milliseconds. Default: 60000.

timeout_ms.description: Hard cap on the file read so a stalled mount surfaces as reason=timeout. Default: 30000.

title: ccgate codex configuration
description: Configuration schema for ccgate's codex PermissionRequest hook. See https://github.com/tak848/ccgate.
